title: [skip-ci] GHA: Fix exceeding secondary rate limit
body:
The dessant/lock-threads github action intermittantly encounters the error:

```
You have exceeded a secondary rate limit. Please wait a few minutes
before you try again.
```

While it's impossible to determine which documented or undocumented rate limit was exceeded, other users of this action have reported improvements by staggering their use of this action.

Ref: Issue 35 https://github.com/dessant/lock-threads/issues

Note: CI is useless for this PR, it must be manually reviewed and manually merged.  See also https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5471

comments.body: @edsantiago Not urgent, PTAL when you have a few minutes.
Nevermind, there's a report in the upstream issue that this does not fix the problem.
